summary: Executed requested password-recovery validation on code + live production domain. Static/lint/ts/export checks passed, Supabase auth API checks passed, but production deep-link routes are returning Vercel 404 and the forgot-password link/state is not present in the deployed login UI.

critical.issue: All tested deep-link paths return Vercel 404 NOT_FOUND in production, breaking direct password-recovery and security route access.

minor.issue: Recover endpoint correctly anti-enumerates unknown email (200), but known email hit 429 rate limit during this run; flow should be rechecked after cooldown.

ui_bugs.issue: Expected 'Esqueci minha senha' entry point not visible in deployed login page, so in-app navigation to forgot-password could not be exercised from UI.

integration_issues.flow: Password recovery deep-link from email to app
integration_issues.issue: Reset/forgot/security direct URLs fail at edge with 404, preventing route initialization and token consumption flow in production.

action_items: Fix production routing/deployment so /forgot-password, /reset-password, /security and /login resolve to the SPA instead of Vercel 404.
Deploy the latest login screen build containing forgot-password-link and re-run e2e recovery path.
Re-test recover endpoint for known email after Supabase rate-limit cooldown to validate full sent-state UX.
critical_code_review_comments: Code-level implementation for password policy sharing, recovery URL token formats (access/refresh, token_hash, code), security re-auth check, and non-hardcoded Supabase keys is present and passed static regression checks.
Root issue observed is deployment/runtime mismatch on public domain, not local source code in reviewed files.
vercel.json includes catch-all rewrite in repo, but live behavior indicates rewrite is not active in current production deployment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use production URL first. Confirm whether deployment includes latest commit and active Vercel SPA rewrites before re-running UI selectors. Supabase password grant for all three QA users is currently 200.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: open https://cut-sync.vercel.app/forgot-password (or /reset-password, /security, /login) and server returns 404 NOT_FOUND page. This blocks deep-link recovery and security route access despite source code implementing these routes. Likely root cause is outdated deployment artifact and/or missing rewrite application on active Vercel deployment.
test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and validated via Supabase password grant endpoint (client/professional/admin => HTTP 200).
